description: Reproducible-output contract for tests/test_skill_quality.py. Feeds the input prompt from example_01 into the script agent with only {scene-spec-schema, spoken-narration-style, pedagogy-cognitive-load} loaded, asserts these metrics on the resulting Script.
notes: Metrics are computed by tools/src/pedagogica_tools/readability.py (Phase 1 week 3).
Signposts detected via a fixed lexicon: watch, notice, here, start, consider, now, so, back, remember, that's, this is.
Hedge tokens: maybe, perhaps, kind of, sort of, roughly, approximately, more or less.
'Anchored to content words' = marker's word is not a determiner, pronoun, preposition, or auxiliary.
